title: Claude Code 2.1.207 configuration-surface envelope
description: A tooling envelope that validates all supported Claude Code configuration surfaces together. This object is not itself a file consumed by Claude Code.

settings.title: Claude Code settings
settings.description: Compatibility schema independently derived from official docs, tagged examples, the verified release binary validation oracle, and scoped first-party references. Unknown future settings remain allowed.

examples: Always run make lint before committing.
Welcome to Acme Corp! Review our code guidelines at docs.acme.com

evidence.heading: Hook lifecycle and Hook handler fields

examples: All plugins from our marketplace are approved by IT

environment.title: Claude Code documented environment
environment.description: A JSON projection of environment variables. Environment values are strings; arbitrary non-Claude variables remain allowed.
environment.x-representation: JSON object projection of process environment

desktopManagedSettings.title: Claude Desktop managed settings
desktopManagedSettings.x-surface: Claude Desktop policy, not Claude Code settings.json

environment.title: Claude Code documented environment
environment.description: A JSON projection of environment variables. Environment values are strings; arbitrary non-Claude variables remain allowed.
environment.x-representation: JSON object projection of process environment

keybindings.title: Claude Code keybindings
keybindings.description: Conservative validator generated only from the official keybindings documentation.
x-validation-limitations: The current official docs do not document command: bindings; the narrowly patterned compatibility form is accepted but annotated as unverified for this release.
The keystroke grammar checks token structure without guessing the exhaustive terminal key vocabulary.
